title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Junior Engineer Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Junior Engineer Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Diploma in Civil Engineering and Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are loo...
